name: Vicinity Centres
analysis: VCX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.5700, stop A$2.3859, target A$3.1223 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
